findings.summary: RP2040-based VFD driver tool with USB-C. Good signal detection overall. TPS562200 estimated Vout only computed for one of two identical regulators. W25Q32 flash memory interface correctly detected.

correct.description: Three voltage dividers correctly identified for voltage sensing/feedback
W25Q32JVSS flash memory interface detected with 6 shared signal nets to RP2040
CMS04 reverse polarity protection correctly identified
USB differential pairs detected (multiple USB ports) with ESD protection
6 RC filters and 5 LC filters detected

incorrect.description: TPS562200 U7 estimated Vout=2.58V but U8 (identical part) has no estimated Vout
TPS54331DR U10 has no estimated Vout despite likely having feedback divider
BOM sum (171) does not match total_components (174) — 3 missing, test_points=4 but test_points appear in BOM for other projects

missed.description: VFD (vacuum fluorescent display) driver circuitry not detected — this is the main function of the board
No current sense detection despite likely having sense resistors for VFD filament drive

suggestions: Ensure estimated_vout is computed consistently for all switching regulators with feedback dividers
Consider VFD driver detection as a signal path
